Crypt::SaltedHash for Perl used non-cryptographic rand() for salt generation. Fix replaces with Crypt::SysRandom. Manually traced 2026-05-28: the vulnerable rand()-based salt loop existed at the initial CPAN import commit 5946c6e ('initial import of Crypt-SaltedHash 0.05'). Edge case: introducer is the repo's first commit.
